**DEVACURL BEAUTY CURLY HAIR STYLING TUTORIAL SHOOT**
**Culver City, California**

### CASTING CALL

**AUDITION DATE**
Monday, June 8, 2026
1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**PAY RATE**
$560 Flat Rate

**SEEKING**

Female-identifying talent, ages 18–40s, including:

* Women
* Non-binary talent
* Androgynous talent
* Transgender talent

All ethnicities, heights, and sizes are encouraged to apply.

### HAIR REQUIREMENTS

* Natural shoulder-length hair or longer
* Curl pattern: **3A, 3B, or 3C**
* Natural hair colors only

**Not Accepted:**

* Extensions
* Wigs
* Hair pieces
* Obvious root regrowth
* Fashion colors (pink, blue, purple, green, etc.)
* Models under 18 years old

### PROJECT DETAILS

This is a **DevaCurl Beauty Styling Tutorial Shoot** featuring curly hair styling techniques and transformations.

The amount of styling performed will be determined collaboratively between the model and the artist.

**No haircut or color services will be performed.**

### AUDITION INFORMATION

**Date:** Monday, June 8, 2026
**Time:** 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM
*(Models may arrive anytime during audition hours.)*

### COMPENSATION

**$560 Flat Rate**

**DM for additional details and submission instructions.**

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

items.text:
EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 – JURYCASTING LIVE
Die Suche nach den außergewöhnlichsten Talenten beginnt.

Für die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 suchen wir Künstlerinnen und Künstler aus ganz Deutschland sowie den europäischen Nachbarländern, die mit Talent, Leidenschaft und Ausstrahlung überzeugen.

Am Samstag, den 20. Juni 2026, findet im XOX-Theater Kleve das offizielle Jurycasting statt. Bewerben können sich Solokünstler, Duos und Gruppen aller Altersklassen und Genres. 

Das Theater befindet sich in der Briener Straße 6–14, 47533 Kleve.  

Gesucht werden Talente aus den Bereichen:

• Musik

• Tanz

• Akrobatik

• Comedy

• Artistik

• Entertainment

• Showacts

• und viele weitere kreative Darbietungen

Jurycasting Live

20. Juni 2026 | 12:00 – 17:00 Uhr

XOX-Theater Kleve

Briener Straße 6–14

47533 Kleve in Nordrhein Westfalen 

Interessierte Talente können sich vorab online anmelden oder am Veranstaltungstag ohne vorherige Bewerbung direkt vor Ort vorsprechen.

Online-Bewerbung:

www.electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html

Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, Ihr Talent auf einer professionellen Bühne zu präsentieren und Teil einer einzigartigen Showproduktion zu werden.

Egal ob aus Deutschland, den Niederlanden, Belgien oder anderen Nachbarländern wir freuen uns auf außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

And if you're watching the replay...

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

items.text:
AMA - Studio & Network Showcase Acting Coach
Hi actors,

Kenzo Lee here.  

I am an audition technique coach, working for NBC Universals Launch program as the coordinator for their AAPHI showcase and will be mentoring for their Easter Seals Disability Acting Showcase later this summer.  I work directly with network, studio, and independent Casting Directors to bring together production and talent.  My acting clients include Series Recurring on major network shows, Series Regulars on Vertical Dramas, and title characters in feature films. 

I'd love to take the opportunity to answer any professional questions you all might have from my perspective.  

I'll keep this post open until Friday 12pm pst and answer questions as they come.  Hoping to be able to so this once every 2-3 months to give back.

topComments.text: Wait love this- Biggest struggle right now is navigating leveling up: navigating getting an agent, manager, becoming a part of an agency- where/how/what to submit ect. Would love some guidance on that - If you have any suggestions since you are opening things up. Appreciate it! Thank you 😌
Is it reccomeded easterly seal disability reccomended

🕌✨ 𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗜𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 𝗔𝗥𝗘 𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗘 — 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗢 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 ✨🕌
Get ready for a magical adventure full of laughter, music, dance, comedy and BIG pantomime energy as TPA brings 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 to the stage! 🌟🎭

Our exciting 2-week audition workshop is the perfect chance for young performers to build confidence, make friends and experience the fun of a full-scale theatre production - no panto experience needed!

⭐ Learn songs & choreography
⭐ Explore characters & script work
⭐ Audition for featured & principal roles
⭐ Be part of an unforgettable production experience

📍 Rutherglen Guide Hall
📅 Audition Workshops: 7th & 14th June
✅ Book here: https://the-performance-academy.classforkids.io/camp/287

🎭 Rehearsals Begin: 21st June
✨ Show Dates: 1st–3rd November 2026
📍 East Kilbride Village Theatre

Whether your child loves acting, singing, dancing or simply wants to shine on stage, this is one they won’t want to miss! 🌟

items.text:
“Bo” CASTING CALL – Proof of Concept Short Film (Austin, TX)
We are seeking a young Asian actress (ages 8–10) and a medium-sized dog for a proof-of-concept shoot for Bo, an upcoming short film currently in development.

My name is Rachel Villagomez, director of Bo, and I will be collaborating with cinematographer Carlos Roberto Nevarez to film a scene from the script as part of the project’s development process.

Logline:

A quiet young girl must find her voice and inner strength to save her beloved dog while adjusting to life on her estranged father’s rural Texas farm, thousands of miles away from the home she left behind.

ROLE: ANIKA

* Female, ages 8–10

* Asian or mixed Asian heritage

* Quiet, thoughtful, and adventurous

* Bilingual (Optional but heavily recommended)

Actors who can speak Thai, Lao, Mandarin, Japanese, or Korean (or another Asian language that reflects their background) are heavily encouraged to apply. Ideally, we would love commit to an actress who may also be interested in participating in a future production of the full short film.

Shoot Dates

June 20–21, 2026

Bear Creek area, Austin, Texas

Compensation

This is a low-budget proof-of-concept production. While funding is limited, meals will be provided and participants will receive footage for their reels/portfolios. Bonus-eligible upon grant reception. 

This is a great opportunity for non actors/beginner actors who want to break into screen acting. 

To submit, please email rmvillagomez3@gmail.com 

headshots/photos, any relevant experience, and availability.

items.text:
There’s now less than a month until the DISCOUNTED early bird offer for our Colne Picture Show short film festival ends. If you have a short that’s under 30mins long, submit it today!

This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We aim to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the beautiful Little Savoy Cinema on the 14th November, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film to submit, follow the link below!

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

items.text:
Casting Call For Fast Food Brand World Cup Ad
I’m currently looking to cast 4 actors for a promo shoot on Monday 8th June in Central Liverpool. The shoot is for a fast food chain where we will be filming a few videos for their social media pages advertising their new World Cup menu! Payment is £100 flat rate & food from the company will be provided on set too! Please bare in mind actors will be working around/with meat products too.

We’re ideally looking for 2x male & 2x female performers from different cultures & back grounds so we urge everybody to apply! 

To apply please send a recent headshot & showreel (if possible) to leomoorebusiness@gmail.com 

📆 Monday 8th June

⏰ 12-5pm

📍Central Liverpool

💰£100 Flat Rate

topComments.text: Hi, just sent you an email☺️⚽️✌️

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

CASTING CALL — CASTRATO

Seeking London-based actors for a psychological horror proof of concept set within a 1970s boys’ choir conservatoire.

“The beauty of a choirboy’s voice lies in its transience.”

We are currently casting the roles of:

• Peter (Male, 8–11)

• Albert (Male, 10–14)

• Michel-Cesar (Male, 40–60)

• Nurse Valentina (Female, 35–60)

Shooting in London • 1 day shoot • 13–14 June

Please see poster for full details.

To apply:

castratofilm@gmail.com

items.text:
**ACCENT SEARCH! Regional LEEDS YORKSHIRE accent needed for actors accent breakdown! Native accents only please!**

Is this you? Are you willing to offer around 2 hours of time to help drama students create a northern accent breakdown for their next project? If so please get in touch asap!

This is an unpaid job but will be a chance to build your network with students from the Oxford School of Drama and an opportunity to skill share.

What will be required of you: voice recordings from provided scripts, 10 min interview, collaborative openness.

Thank you for your time 😊

topComments.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.
You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette
Science Boffins

📣 POSZUKUJEMY DO REKLAMY ZNANEJ SIECI TELEKOMUNIKACYJNEJ 📣

Poszukujemy epizodystów do udziału w realizacji nowej kampanii reklamowej

📅 Termin zdjęć: 9 czerwca
📍 Lokalizacja: studio filmowe w Warszawie
💰 Stawka: 600 zł

Kogo szukamy?

✔ Kobiety i mężczyźni w wieku 18–40 lat
✔ Osoby o nowoczesnym, zadbanym wyglądzie
✔ Mile widziane ciekawe fryzury, tatuaże, kolczyki oraz charakterystyczny styl
✔ Osoby swobodnie czujące się przed kamerą

Klimat projektu:

✨ Nowoczesna kampania reklamowa
🎬 Dynamiczne sceny i profesjonalna produkcja
🌟 Pozytywna energia i współczesny lifestyle

📩 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy poprzez formularz w linku

FORMULARZ ZGŁOSZENIOWY: https://forms.gle/bqGQB5n6sMLvEcjJ7

lub mailowo na adres: ludzie@unagimedia.pl
W tytule wiadomości wpisz: P9

W zgłoszeniu prześlij:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• numer telefonu
• aktualne zdjęcia
• krótką wizytówkę video (jeśli posiadasz)

Zgłoszenie oznacza akceptację wykorzystania wizerunku z zastosowaniem technologii AI.

Czekamy na Twoją odpowiedź!

items.text:
🔴 Promocyjna opłata za udział — tylko 20 pln! 🔴

✨🌟 Czy jesteś gotowy, aby pokazać światu swój talent? 🌟✨

🎭🎶 Zapraszamy do udziału w III International Art Competition „THE BEST” — konkursie, który powstał z myślą o tych, którzy nie boją się marzyć, tworzyć i sięgać po więcej! 💫

🏆 Nazwa „THE BEST” to nie tylko słowa. To wyzwanie, inspiracja i motywacja do rozwoju. Każdy artysta ma w sobie coś wyjątkowego, a sukces zaczyna się od odwagi, by zaprezentować swój talent światu. Może właśnie Ty okażesz się jednym z najlepszych? ⭐

📅 Przyjmowanie zgłoszeń trwa od 29.05 do 12.06.

💻 Uczestnictwo zdalne — dołącz do konkursu z dowolnego miejsca i pokaż swoje umiejętności bez wychodzenia z domu! 🌍✨

🎨 Konkurs jest otwarty dla wszystkich:
👶👵 Bez ograniczeń wiekowych;
🎭🎤🎻 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki!

🏅 Na uczestników czekają:
📜 Dyplomy i listy podziękowania;
🥇 Medale i puchary;
🌟 Niezapomniane emocje oraz możliwość zaprezentowania swojej twórczości szerszej publiczności!

💫 Nie odkładaj marzeń na później. Każdy wielki sukces zaczyna się od pierwszego kroku, a każdy talent zasługuje na swoją szansę. Pokaż, że jesteś THE BEST! 🌟🏆🎶

📌 Dodatkowe informacje:
🌐 2GAGENCJA.COM

items.text:
!!! PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!!

Do najnowszych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Dłużnik (32) – szczupły narkoman
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

2. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

3. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, umięśniony, "dresiarz"
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

5. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – normalny facet, w dobrej kondycji. Sprawny aktorsko. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

!!! PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!!

Do najnowszych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn w różnym wieku do następujących ról:

1. Dłużnik (32) – szczupły narkoman
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

2. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

3. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, umięśniony, "dresiarz"
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

5. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – normalny facet, w dobrej kondycji. Sprawny aktorsko. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

Background performers needed as wedding and Melse guests (volunteer)
We're working on a beautiful low budget short film set at an Ethiopian wedding. 

Our dates:

- Saturday, June 13

- Sunday, June 14 (half a day)

Location: Surrey, BC

It is unpaid; however we are providing lunch and craft service.

It's a celebration of culture! Be part of our delightful guests.

If interested, please fill out our google form: 

https://forms.gle/i5ECJZGkRMiNCMHPA

Thank you!

Hello! My name is Waleska Duno, I'm the producer of "The Starting Line" a student short film in association with Valencia College, Orlando Fl.

This is non-paid and non-union. Food will be provided.

Audition will be this Saturday June 6th at Valencia College East Campus 701 N Econlockhatchee Trail, Orlando, FL, 32825. 

**Self Tape is acceptable**

The Filming will take place July 11-13th, please email me if you have any questions! 

Sides will be provided via email. 

Stay Groovy, 

Waleska Duno

Sound Mixer here. Looking for crew later?

items.text:
**Contact: info@afterglowthefilm.com**

**CASTING CALL**

We are casting for an independent feature film shooting around Los Angeles, CA.

**Shoot Dates**: August 13-23 (6-7 max filming days)

—

**COMPENSATION**:
DEFERRED PAY (with contract) includes:

IMDb credit, meals, footage

—

**Working Title**: Afterglow

**Genre**: Thriller, Drama

**Logline**: Set in 1997, a closeted teen becomes complicit in a tragedy as he’s forced to choose between two people who have the most power over him. 

**Casting** (***local to LA county/surrounding areas***):
* **Logan** (lead-LGBTQ+ preferred): 18-25, 5’10”+, lean, magnetic yet unraveling internally, fighting his desires. *intimacy required with another male*
* **Rachel** (co-lead): 18-25, toned, deceptively innocent, socially in control. she uses manipulation and emotional control to get her way 
* **Erika** (co-lead): 18-25, innocent look, incredible comedic timing, deadpan vibes
* **Lexi** (dayplayer): 18-25, slender, has slightly restless/fidgety physical energy
* **Nick** (dayplayer): 28-38, toxic heartthrob, past his glory days and doesn’t know it, attractive yet dangerous

If you are interested, please submit the following ***requirements***:
* Headshot
* Reel or any self-tape (if available)
* Confirmation you are available August 13-23, 2026
* Question: What is your favorite film so far in 2026?

To be considered, answer/include **everything** applicable above and send to [info@afterglowthefilm.com](mailto:info@afterglowthefilm.com)

**DEVACURL BEAUTY CURLY HAIR STYLING TUTORIAL SHOOT**
**Culver City, California**

### CASTING CALL

**AUDITION DATE**

Monday, June 8, 2026

1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**PAY RATE**

$560 Flat Rate

**SEEKING**

Female-identifying talent, ages 18–40s, including:

* Women

* Non-binary talent

* Androgynous talent

* Transgender talent

All ethnicities, heights, and sizes are encouraged to apply.

### HAIR REQUIREMENTS

* Natural shoulder-length hair or longer

* Curl pattern: **3A, 3B, or 3C**

* Natural hair colors only

**Not Accepted:**

* Extensions

* Wigs

* Hair pieces

* Obvious root regrowth

* Fashion colors (pink, blue, purple, green, etc.)

* Models under 18 years old

### PROJECT DETAILS

This is a **DevaCurl Beauty Styling Tutorial Shoot** featuring curly hair styling techniques and transformations.

The amount of styling performed will be determined collaboratively between the model and the artist.

**No haircut or color services will be performed.**

### AUDITION INFORMATION

**Date:** Monday, June 8, 2026

**Time:** 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

*(Models may arrive anytime during audition hours.)*

### COMPENSATION

**$560 Flat Rate**

**DM for additional details and submission instructions.**

items.text:
Hvis jeg skulle bestemme, ville jeg spise disse hver dag.

Min veninde Klara grinede og sagde: "Jeg forstår dig fuldstændig godt - de er vanedannende!"

Så nemme at lave, så saftige og fulde af smag, at man aldrig bliver træt af dem!

Og så er der en mand, der går derhen... og han ved, at han er den rette!
Modtag og kommenter.

Hvis du vil følge mine opskrifter, så skriv "ja".

items.text:
Hello!  I'm planning to make a short film in the coming month and need a few actors.

Title: "Jude and the Bartender."  About a ten-minute film.

A young bartender finds himself panicking when all of the booze he was supposed to serve at a wedding suddenly disappears, and a mysterious St. Jude card shows up to save the day.

Characters:

BARISTA: 25-25, female, any race.

EMILY: 25-45, female, the wedding coordinator.

JUDE: 25-50, male, the caterer.

I likely have BEN (the bartender) cast already but if anything changes I'll post it here.

This will be a volunteer gig but I promise it'll be fun and shouldn't take more than a few days to shoot.  Beers will be on me when shooting is done.

If interested, email me at brettmanero@gmail.com!

topComments.text: What dates are you looking for?

sharedPost.text:
Kamed Studio Warszawa 
29 maja - piątek- to już JUTRO
Tylko osoby z Warszawy 

MINI EPIZOD 
Stawka 200 zl.

Do małego epizodu szukamy kobiety I mężczyzny w wieku 25 - 45 lat. Kobieta koniecznie blond włosy, obydwoje bez widocznych tatuaży 
Epizody bez tekstu. Plan od około 10.00 do około 15.00

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenia zawierające 
- imię I nazwisko 
- wiek
- aktualne zdjęcie
- wizytówkę w postaci linku do YouTube 

na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

z dopiskiem w tytule EPIZOD

Hello!
I am currently looking for two female actresses for my up coming short film 'Septicemia'. 

The role of Florence is open for an age change!

Please note, this is an unpaid role and we will not be able to repay travel expenses. 

Thank you!

items.text:
Legit Casting Calls should provide

1. Name of project
2. Roles they are casting
3. Age, 
4. Race/ethnicity (if it matters) 
5. Name of production Company, Casting director, Director and writer 
6. How an actor should submit-email, eco cast, in person, zoom etc
7. What materials are wanted (usual is headshot, resume, reel)
8. Location
9. Union or Nonunion
10. Pay/unpaid

topComments.text: And all ages is 0-99+…. If you only want 18+, say it! Dont just write all ages!

items.title: Legit Casting Calls should provide

items.text:
I am going to clarify my two posts. 

I am not referring to actors who are genuinely interested in opportunities or asking thoughtful questions. I am referring to the pattern of vague casting posts receiving dozens of comments such as “interested,” “I’m a great actor,” or “consider me,” without anyone verifying who posted the notice, whether the project is legitimate, or how submissions are supposed to be handled.

Casting professionals are not generally scrolling through Facebook comments to select actors. Research the project, confirm that the opportunity is legitimate, read the submission instructions, and submit professionally. That protects actors and presents them more effectively.

The original wording was direct because the industry can be direct. The intention was not to insult actors. It was to encourage better judgment and safer, more professional habits.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — CHILD ACTRESS (ATLANTA, GA)
Independent Short Film: “Glass Crown: The Repast

Production is currently seeking a young actress to portray ATHENA, a key supporting role in an emotionally grounded dramatic short film.

ROLE:

ATHENA

Black female

Age Range: 6–10 years old

Athena is observant, intelligent, calm, and emotionally mature beyond her years. She carries a quiet presence and strong emotional depth.

FILMING LOCATION:

Atlanta, Georgia

PLEASE NOTE:

Applicants must be based in or able to work as a local hire in Atlanta, GA.

SHOOT DATES:

June 12–14, 2026

(Child actors will not be needed for all shoot days.)

COMPENSATION:

This is an unpaid independent short film project.

Meals will be provided on set.

IMDb credit and festival exposure included.

TO SUBMIT:

Please send:

• Headshot or recent photo

• Age

• Acting reel or self-tape (if available)

• Parent/guardian contact information

Send submissions to:

LadyOnyxx89@gmail.com 

Director:

Jessica Carter

“Glass Crown: The Repast”

items.text:
Making you look as if you’re supposed to be in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
Most people will watch this reel and think…

“That looks terrifying.”

They’re right.

That’s exactly why you should do it.

One weekend. One microphone. One chance to prove to yourself you’re capable of more than you think.

Stand-up comedy isn’t instant talent.

It’s technique.

And you’ll learn it from multi-award-winning comedian Jed Salisbury before performing live in front of an audience.

People travel from all over the UK for this.

Your turn? 🎤

🎟️ https://buy.stripe.com/14A28r5bs5pZ5aw0oi4gg0y

#StandUpComedy #YorkshireEvents #ConfidenceBuilding #ChallengeYourself #LiveComedy

items.title: Most people will watch this reel and think…

items.text:
One of the biggest mistakes actors make in self-tapes is playing it safe.

Casting directors, directors and producers aren’t just watching your performance. They’re asking themselves:

“Would I want to work with this person?”

When you make positive, creative choices in your self-tape, it shows confidence. It shows imagination. It shows you’re bringing something to the table rather than waiting to be told what to do.

The actors who consistently get work aren’t always the most experienced. They’re often the ones brave enough to make a choice.

Next time you self-tape, stop asking, “What do they want?”

Start asking, “What’s the most interesting version of this scene I can bring to life?”

Your choices tell people who you are.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina for support.

#ActorsLife #SelfTape #ActingCoach #CastingDirector #ScreenActing #ActorMindset

items.summary:
One of the biggest mistakes actors make in self-tapes is playing it safe.

Casting directors, directors and producers aren’t just watching your performance. They’re asking themselves:

“Would I want to work with this person?”

When you make positive, creative choices in your self-tape, it shows confidence. It shows imagination. It shows you’re bringing something to the table rather than waiting to be told what to do.

The actors who consistently get work aren’t always the most experienced. They’re often the ones brave enough to make a choice.

Next time you self-tape, stop asking, “What do they want?”

Start asking, “What’s the most interesting version of this scene I can bring to life?”

Your choices tell people who you are.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina for support.

#ActorsLife #SelfTape #ActingCoach #CastingDirector #ScreenActing #ActorMindset

items.text:
Casting Call - MA Final Project
Casting Call: Writer (Lead Role) – Short Film

Shooting dates: 26th – 27th June 2026

Location: West London

Rate: £150/day (negotiable) + £50 night shoot supplement (if applicable) With catering and travel expense 

Contact: 1252273@metfilmstudents.ac.uk

Project: A psychological short film about a writer whose crime‑fiction meta‑narrative blurs with reality. The story follows an unnamed Writer (female-presenting, 20s–30s，Asian) – a calm, detached creator who orchestrates a staged murder in her basement while casually conversing with her “victim”. She is precise, intelligent, and quietly unsettling.

Role: THE WRITER (lead)

Character snapshot:

· Composed, observant, with a dry sense of humour.

· Moves between dreamlike control and sudden vulnerability.

· Speaks in short, deliberate lines (see script excerpts).

· Must be comfortable with psychological tension, light physical staging (rearranging props, wiping floors), and close‑up emotional shifts.

Shooting details:

· Two days (26–27 June) in West London.

· Day interiors 

· £150/day (negotiable based on experience) – plus £50 supplement for any night work.

To apply:

Send a recent headshot, CV/showreel link (or short self‑tape reading the lines below) to 1252273@metfilmstudents.ac.uk. Please put “WRITER CASTING – [Your Name]” in the subject line.

🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text:
Cześć!

Poszukuję możliwości współpracy przy produkcjach filmowych, telewizyjnych, reklamowych oraz eventowych jako fotograf planu lub twórca krótkich materiałów backstage/video.

Oferuję:
📸 zdjęcia z planu filmowego i wydarzeń,
🎬 krótkie relacje video i materiały backstage do social mediów,
📱 pionowe formaty na Instagram, Facebook i TikTok,
⚡ szybkie przekazanie materiałów po realizacji.

Pracuję na profesjonalnym sprzęcie Canon oraz posiadam doświadczenie w fotografii plenerowej, eventowej i reportażowej.

Oferuję:
📸 zdjęcia z planu filmowego i wydarzeń,

items.text:
Allround-TV geht völlig neue Wege mit Auftrags-Video-Produktionen in virtueller Umgebung. Wir erstellen komplette virtuelle Studios nach Ihren Vorgaben, setzen den Moderator, die Moderatorin via GreenScreen in die virtuelle 3D Umgebung, animieren die Szene mit Tracking-Kameras in Echtzeit und schalten Studiogäste, Interviewpartner, Experten auf Wunsch weltweit via Live-Stream zu. Eine fantastische Möglichkeit, Ihren Video-Content technisch auf der Höhe der Zeit zu erstellen. Ab sofort möglich im eigenen professionellen Video-Studio von Allround-TV in Altötting. Wir setzen Sie in Szene!
Montage & Screenshots © 2026 by Allround-TV

items.text:
🌟 AUDITION NOTICE – DICK WHITTINGTON 🌟
Dreamworld Entertainments, in association with the Gladstone Theatre, are on the lookout for talented performers to join this year’s magical production of Dick Whittington! 🎭✨

We’re seeking triple-threat male and female performers for principal roles, as well as a talented Cat (strong singer with acro skills preferred) and Fairy.

🎤 Strong acting and vocal ability required

💃 Excellent movement skills essential

🎶 Prepare two contrasting songs

📄 Successful applicants will be sent audition sides

📍 Auditions will take place at the Gladstone Theatre, Port Sunlight

📅 Performers must be available from 27th November – 31st December and have a Liverpool base.

To register your interest, send your CV, Spotlight link/showreel and relevant details to:

📧 dreamworldprincesses@yahoo.co.uk

⏰ Registration closes Friday 12th June. Please note that auditions are by registration only.

We can’t wait to discover the stars of our 2025 pantomime adventure! ⭐🐱👠

#DickWhittington #Auditions #CastingCall #Pantomime #LiverpoolTheatre #MusicalTheatre #TripleThreatPerformer #ActingJobs #TheatreAuditions #GladstoneTheatre #DreamworldEntertainments

Must be available 27th Nov to 31st Dec and have Liverpool base. Auditions will be held at the Gladstone Theatre in Port Sunlight in June. Email dreamworldprincsses@yaho.co.u yahoo.co.uk to register by Friday 12th June. Please do not turn up if you have not registered.'

items.text:
🎬 Statist:innen gesucht – Imagefilmdreh Wien

Wir suchen kurzfristig Verstärkung für einen Imagefilmdreh kommende Woche!
📅 Wann: Montag 1.6. und/oder Dienstag 2.6. jeweils ab Mittag bis Abend
⏱ Auch kürzere Zeitslots möglich
📍 Wo: Wien

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für die regelmäßige Content-Produktion unserer Social-Media-Kanäle suchen wir für **Ende Juni** sympathische Gesichter vor der Kamera! Wir drehen in zwei wunderschönen Hotels an der Ostsee und suchen dafür unterschiedliche Profile (Vorkenntnisse sind nicht notwendig!):

**📍 OPTION 1: **IFA Rügen Hotel & Ferienpark
* **Gesucht:** Familien (optimal 2 Erwachsene und maximal 2 Kinder)
* **Alter:** Eltern zwischen 25 und 45 Jahren, Kinder bis maximal 12 Jahre

**📍 OPTION 2: **IFA Graal-Müritz Hotel, Spa & Tagungen
* **Gesucht:** Ein Paar
* **Alter:** Zwischen 25 und 50 Jahren

🗓️ **Wann?** Ab Ende Juni oder auch in den kommenden Monaten (genaue Termine und Tage stimmen wir individuell ab).

💡 **Ablauf & Setting:** Es gibt einen festen, vorgegebenen Drehplan. Ihr werdet von unserem Produktionsteam professionell und entspannt angeleitet und setzt gemeinsam mit uns schöne Urlaubsszenen im Hotel um (z. B. beim Frühstück, im Wellnessbereich oder am Strand).

Da das Projekt im Rahmen einer Kooperation ohne Geldfluss realisiert wird, bieten wir euch einen tollen Mehrwert:
* **Übernachtung & Verpflegung:** Wir laden euch für den Zeitraum des Drehs zu uns ins jeweilige Hotel ein – für eure Unterkunft sowie die komplette Verpflegung ist selbstverständlich gesorgt!
* **High-End-Material:** Nach dem Dreh stellen wir euch das professionell produzierte und bearbeitete Bild- und Videomaterial (Studio-Qualität) sehr gerne kostenfrei zur Verfügung – eine tolle Erinnerung oder perfekt für die eigene Sedcard / das Portfolio.
* **Erfahrung:** Ein spannender Blick hinter die Kulissen eines professionellen Drehteams.

**Interesse?** Wenn ihr Zeit und Lust auf einen Kurztrip inkl. Shooting an der Ostsee habt, schreibt uns gerne eine Nachricht mit:
1. Für welches Hotel (Rügen oder Graal-Müritz) ihr euch bewerbt
2. Aktuellen Fotos von euch (bzw. eurer Familie) und/oder Proben aus vorherigen Projekten
3. Eurem Alter (bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)(bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)
4. Eurer Verfügbarkeit Ende Juni 

Wir freuen uns auf eure Nachrichten! 📩

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Party  gesucht /Berlin,
Für ein studentisches Film Projektsuche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Party karaoke Nacht .

In Berlin am 29.05.2026  zwischen 15-18 h 

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet am 29.05  zwischen 15.00 und 18.00 statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. 

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

items.text:
CASTING CALL 'Sugarcoat'

Student film in association with The University of Edinburgh

Edinburgh-based actors ideal

A sister and a brother travelling back from their father’s funeral together stop for a picnic at a motorway services. The sister reflects on a stream of conflicting memories of her father.

Roles: 

sister (age: 25-35)

brother (age: 35-45)

father (age: 50-65)

Filming dates: June 21st-25th and possibly 13th-14th

CONTACT: s2565300@ed.ac.uk

attachments.ocrText: Puede ser una imagen de texto que dice "m COMTACT: S2565300@ED.AC.UK CASTING CALL 'SUGARCOAT' Student film in association with the University of Edinburgh SISTER AND A BROTHER TRAVELLING BACK FROM THEIR FATHER'S FUNERAL TOGETHER STOP FOR A PICNIC AT A MOTORWAY SERVICES. THE SISTER REFLECTS ON A STREAM OF CONFLICTING MEMORIES OF HER FATHER. ROLES SISTER FEMALE, AGE 25-35 BROTHER- MALE, AGE 35-45 MAIN CHARACTER YOUNGER SIBLING, SUCCESSFUL AND SELF-ASSURED OLDER SIBLING, LOST SPIRIT WHO IS PROFESSIONALLY UNSATISFIED FATHER MALE, AGE 50-65 SECONDARY CHARACTER INFLUENTIAL, SELF-DESTRUCTIVE FIGURE IN HIS CHILDREN'S LIVES *ACTORS *ACTORSARENOTREQUIREDTOBERELATED NOT REQUIRED"

items.text:
CASTING CALL — WICKED FRIDAYS 

NOC Theatre is seeking Black performers for the theatre production, Wicked Fridays, a dark psychological thriller exploring isolation, desire, survival, and the stories we tell ourselves to endure.

We're currently casting:

LEILANI (Female, 25–30) — British-Caribbean
ARIEL (Male, 18–22) — Caribbean accent required

 London
 Paid
 Auditions: 22–24 June
 Rehearsals: August
 Performances: October

To apply, send your:
• Headshot
• CV
• Spotlight Link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

If you're drawn to psychologically intense storytelling, layered characters, and atmospheric theatre, we'd love to hear from you.

#CastingCall #BlackActors #BlackPerformers #TheatreCasting #LondonTheatre #ActorsUK #BritishTheatre #CaribbeanActors #StageActors #Auditions #PaidActingJob #WickedFridays

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

items.title: GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

items.text:
!!! CASTING CALL !!!
ESCROW

Non-Union, UNPAID

LOGLINE:

A shaman/flâneur enters into an industrial realm of dreams (downtown Toronto). He moves in light but there’s a sinister prenatal force permeating the space camouflaged as lurid beams of color/light. He encounters marginal characters that trace lines of flight, unconsciously pushing him deeper into psychic chasms of digital voodoo. The film is fragmentary but there’s a subtle through line which connects the mundanity of phenomena to the cosmos.

GENRE: 12 Minutes experimental, spiritual, psychological.

FILMING LOCATION: Greater Toronto Area

SHOOTING DATE: TBA 

CHARACTERS:

CROWLEY - Male, Black, early 20s

KONDRATII - Male, Black, early 20s

FIGURE IN A RED CLOAK - 

OLD MAN - Male, Caucasian, Obese, late 40s early 50s

MASKED MAN - 

BLEACHED HAIR GIRL - Female, Black, early 20s, with blonde hair and eyebrows or open to dying hair and eyebrows for the project

EYE PATCH GUY - Male, early 20s, must be comfortable wearing and performing with an eyepatch for the project

SWANN - Male, mid 30s

WHITE COUPLE (MALE) - Male, mid 30s, no dialogue 

WHITE COUPLE (FEMALE) - Female, mid 30s, no dialogue

YOUNG GIRL - Black, aged 10-13, parent or guardian must be on set and present for audition.

BANKER - 

PIG MASK ROBBER - 

DOG MASK ROBBER - 

If interested, please send the following to:

maidoudenzel@gmail.com

&

junyudai21@gmail.com

In your email, please include the following:

Subject Line: ESCROW (CHARACTER NAME) - YOUR NAME

Headshot

Name, age, ethnicity, and city of residence

Resume, Portfolio, Social Media Links and IMDb (if available)

Demo Reel (if available)

If you are applying for multiple characters please send separate emails.

The deadline for all applications is Tuesday June 16

Thank you all in advance.

items.title: !!! CASTING CALL !!!

items.text:
Quick question for anyone who's run casting on a production:

How many places does your process live right now?

For most teams it's something like, a spreadsheet for tracking, Google Drive for tapes, email chains for feedback, a notes app for decisions, and a group chat where half the context gets lost.

I know because I've been there myself.

I'm a filmmaker. Not a developer. But I kept running into the same problem on every production and couldn't find a tool that actually solved it, so I decided to build one anyway.

That's Reveeu.

One workspace where your team can collect submissions, watch and review tapes together, leave feedback in context, track decisions, and keep the whole process moving, without hunting through five different tabs to figure out where things stand.

I'm building this, with the right tools and the right people around me. No VC, no corporate agenda. Just a filmmaker who got fed up and decided to do something about it.

If this sounds familiar, I'd love to have you on the waitlist. I'm personally talking to everyone who signs up, your input is directly shaping what gets built.

items.summary:
Quick question for anyone who's run casting on a production:

How many places does your process live right now?

For most teams it's something like, a spreadsheet for tracking, Google Drive for tapes, email chains for feedback, a notes app for decisions, and a group chat where half the context gets lost.

I know because I've been there myself.

I'm a filmmaker. Not a developer. But I kept running into the same problem on every production and couldn't find a tool that actually solved it, so I decided to build one anyway.

That's Reveeu.

One workspace where your team can collect submissions, watch and review tapes together, leave feedback in context, track decisions, and keep the whole process moving, without hunting through five different tabs to figure out where things stand.

I'm building this, with the right tools and the right people around me. No VC, no corporate agenda. Just a filmmaker who got fed up and decided to do something about it.

If this sounds familiar, I'd love to have you on the waitlist. I'm personally talking to everyone who signs up, your input is directly shaping what gets built.

🔗 Link in comments 👇

Der Gesang löst Blockaden, lässt Emotionen frei und setzt Endorphine frei!

Unentbehrlich für das Singen!

Möchtest auch Du mehr über all‘ diese Zusammenhänge erfahren , dann melde Dich!

Ihre / Eure
Annette Kuhn

Groß Gerau

Dear Multicultural Dancers we are really glad to announce our open air season Is back and it will be talking place at Patio Latino this Thursday June 4th, the Program runs as follows:

⏳✅20:00 Opening Doors to warm up &  eat tacos
💃21:00 Salsa Workshop by Jorge & Angela
💃21:45 Bachata Sensual Workshop by Jorge&Angela 
🎧22:15 Social Dance 50% Salsa, 50% Bachata
⬅️00:00 Closing Doors

Entrance free but we kindly ask for your collaboration with Patio Latino  Bar asking at least one drink or something at the restaurant, they have lots of recomendable latin amierican dishes and cocktails such as Pisco Sour, Tequila Sunrise, Cuba Libre, Piña Colada, etc, in order to continue with this event.🍲🥑🌮🍹🍷🍸

Come on your own, dance couple or friends and you won't regret coming at Patio Latino 

🚩Address: Aleja 3 Maja & Leona Kruczkowskiego, Warszawa
📷 Instagram Page: @multicultural_sb_wsw
📝Sign in Via Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/share/1bmL1wKKzZ/

🎬 **TV-PROJEKT SUCHT: Ein Raum-Makeover in Köln & Umgebung! ⛺**

Hey zusammen! 👋 Habt ihr Lust, euch entspannte Festival-Vibes in die eigenen vier Wände zu holen?

Für ein neues TV-Projekt verwandelt Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che deinen Raum in eine warme, gemütliche Wüsten-Oase im coolen „Desert Modern“-Style. ✨🌵

Mehr Infos gibt’s im verlinkten Post. Wenn ihr Lust auf das Makeover habt, meldet euch einfach per PN bei mir! 📧

sharedPost.text:
Du wohnst in Köln oder Umgebung und hast Lust auf einen echten Tapetenwechsel?🌿🐪 Wir holen dir die entspannten Festival-Vibes des legendären „Burning Man“ direkt nach Hause!🎉Raumdesignerin Emell Gök Che verwandelt deinen Raum in eine gemütliche Wüsten-Oase – warm, erdig und modern. Das Ganze wird für ein öffentlich-rechtliches TV-Format begleitet und aufgezeichnet.✨🌵

Du hast Interesse? Schreib uns eine PN oder melde dich per Mail an wohnenunddesign@bavaria-entertainment.de📧

items.text:
Hey zusammen :)
ich bin 20 und möchte mich ernsthaft im Schauspiel weiterentwickeln – sowohl im Bereich Theater als auch Film.
Ich habe bereits mit Monologen gearbeitet und erste Vorsprechen-Erfahrung gesammelt, merke aber, dass mir vor allem Praxis, Austausch und Kontakte fehlen.
Deshalb suche ich:
– Leute auf ähnlichem Level zum gemeinsamen Üben (Monologe/Szenen)
– kleine Film- oder Theaterprojekte (auch Low Budget/Studentenprojekte)
– und generell Austausch mit anderen Schauspieler:innen (gern auch etwas erfahrener), z.B. zu Themen wie Einstieg, Agenturen etc.
Mir geht es darum, Erfahrung zu sammeln, besser zu werden und mich Schritt für Schritt in dem Bereich aufzubauen.
Ich bin zuverlässig, motiviert und offen für Neues 🙌
Falls jemand Lust hat, sich auszutauschen oder etwas zusammen zu starten, schreibt mir gern!

topComments.text:
Hey Lia.
Gut zu wissen wäre, wo du ansässig bist. 
Also eher Berlin, Hamburg, München, Köln oder Pusemuckel... 🤭😆

LG und VIEL ERFOLG!

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

And if you're watching the replay...

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

items.text:
A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

🎬 CASTING! CASTING! FINAL CALL! 🚨
Seeking married couples, long-term relationships, and couples with children NATIONWIDE for a nationally syndicated TV show 👀✨

❤️ Real couples

💍 Married OR not married

👨‍👩‍👧 Couples with kids are a PLUS

🔥 Real issues, real stories

‼️ REAL COUPLES ONLY — this is NOT a scripted role

🚫 No actors or individuals with acting credits, please

📲 APPLY HERE (copy & paste into your browser):

https://seekingmarriedlongtermcouplesinrelationshipsnationwidecasting.castingcrane.com/

✈️ WHAT WE PROVIDE:

• Round-trip airfare

• Hotel stay

• Pickup from your home (or preferred location) to your local airport

• A FREE day when you arrive in Atlanta

• Film the next day + fly home the same day

💰 PAY:

• $600 per person ($1,200 per couple)

• $100 each upon arrival

• $500 check each when you leave

💄 ON-SET PERKS:

• Hair, makeup & wardrobe provided

• Barber available for men

• (We recommend bringing your own wardrobe just in case)

✨ EXTRAS (if needed):

• Lie detector tests

• DNA tests

• Marriage & couples counseling (covered by us)

💬 If counseling is offered, we cover it. Typically it’s 1–2 sessions, depending on the situation, and your producer will go over all details with you.

📍 Filming in Atlanta (1-day shoot)

⏰ SPOTS ARE LIMITED — BOOKING FAST!

This is the FINAL CALL, don’t miss your chance!

items.text:
ISO: writers/other creatives!
Hello everyone!

My name’s Mason Sauseda and I’m a director and DP based out of Chicago for my own projects and series of short documentaries. I also own a videography company that specializes in both standard and FPV drone work. 

I know there are people out there with ideas, but have been stuck in the production phase & how to make their vision come to life. Let’s make it happen!

I am looking to collaborate with a writer or anyone with a creative idea to produce a short film. I’m interested in a few different genres: horror & psychological thrillers, nostalgic/emotional pieces, and real stories - but I’m open to any and all ideas!

I’m also looking into creating some spec ads and more music videos if that is something you’re interested in as well!

I added some of my work below if you want to check it out.

DM me if you’re interested in working together!

The Life of Jacob Gilreath | Like Father, Like Son
https://youtu.be/rpkfFAF0DWg

The Life Of Tyler Johnson | Motorcyclist & Survivor
https://youtu.be/sPSEOHyTEJc

See This - Day & Night Ft Bambi (Official Music Video)
https://youtu.be/yX3hoo2ghHI

items.text:
Have you been recorded by someone wearing meta glasses without your consent? Are you based in Manchester, Liverpool, or surrounding areas? If so, we would love to hear from you for a new documentary series investigating the alarming rise of non-consensual recordings via meta glasses.

Please email oliviaryan.talent@gmail.com with the subject META / FULL NAME / AGE / LOCATION YOU ARE BASED IN with a short description about your experience. We will aim to reply to everyone. Once contacted you may be looped in with the production company directly for consideration of involvement.

*Please note we are looking for contributors with real first-hand experiences, this is not paid and not an acting position.

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’m a London-based actor currently seeking representation and creative opportunities!

My background includes theatre/stage work and medical simulation performance for healthcare training, where I worked within structured scenarios that combined improvisation, responsiveness, but also direction-led performance.

I graduated with First Class Honours in Drama, Theatre & Performance and I take a flexible approach to acting, as I draw from a range of training and performance techniques depending on a role.

I’m currently building my screen material and would love to connect with agents, casting professionals, filmmakers and collaborators for future projects.

I’ve attached my headshots and I’m happy to share my Spotlight and additional material via DM!

Thanks for reading. 😊

items.text:
San Fernando Valley Parking Lot Available for Filming / Basecamp

Looking to see if there’s any interest from production crews, location managers, or event organizers.

We have a large private parking lot available at 5650 Shoup Ave, Woodland Hills, CA 91367 in the west San Fernando Valley. The lot can accommodate 100+ vehicles and works well for:

* Film & TV basecamp
* Crew parking
* Production staging
* Equipment storage
* Commercial shoots
* Special events

Easy access, plenty of space, and flexible availability depending on the date.

For details, availability, or rates, text Sam at 818-300-3023.

Hi everyone! I’m a student at the Lee Strasberg Institute and I created a play for the Fringe Festival along with my husband (US veteran). I would appreciate if you could support us and come see the show and share it. Tickets are free ✅  Show starts in 12 days!

items.text:
## 📣 CASTING CALL: NON-UNION TALENT (LOS ANGELES/LONG BEACH AREA) 📣

**PROJECT:** GardaWorld - ECAM + GWS _ B-roll Content Shoot 

**ROLE:** GWS Agent (General) 

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union 

**RATE:** Paid, Full Image Buyout

## 👤 PROFILE SOUGHT 
* **Quantity:** 1 Talent
* **Age/Look:** Young, multiethnic, fit, and confident (mid-30s-mid-40s would be ideal
* **Character Note:** No smiling (stern/professional demeanour).
* **Wardrobe:** Will require a full uniform and an Ambassador badge (provided on set).

## 📅** SHOOT DETAILS**
* **Date:** Monday, June 15, 2026
* **Location:** Near Long Beach Airport (LGB), CA
* *Local hires only (no travel or accommodation provided).*

## 📩 HOW TO APPLY

If you are available and fit the description, please submit by email to: **andreanne.fc@noba.com by Friday, June 5.**

**Subject Line:** GWS Agent - [Your Name]

**Please include:**
1. Full-length body photos (recent, clear lighting, no filters).
2. Your current measurements/sizes.
3. Your contact information.

🚫 **NO DMs PLEASE.** Direct messages on Facebook will not be reviewed. 
⚠️ *Due to the volume of submissions, only pre-selected candidates will be contacted.*

Thank you! 🙏

topComments.text: Andréanne Fluet-Chabot where's the love to the thickens hahahaha

CASTING CALL - MDance Company Tour '27

Für „4Elemente“ suchen wir 1 Tänzerin / 1 Tänzer für die Tour 2027

🔸Gesucht wird:
•Starke Jazz-Technik
•Partnering-Skills
•Erfahrung in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial
•Teamplayer mit starker Bühnenpräsenz

🔸Proben: Osterferien 2027 in Bamberg
🔸Shows:
•7.4.2027 -  BAMBERG 
•17.4.2027 - ERBACH/ODW
•24.4.2027 – ANDERNACH 
•15.5.2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Bezahlung, Unterkunft, Fahrtkosten, Verpflegung an Showtagen 

🔸Bewerbung mit
•Anschreiben, indem du uns mitteilst, warum du Teil unseres Teams werden möchtest
•Aktuellem Lebenslauf
•Foto – Headshot und Ganzkörper
•Showreel / Videolink, falls vorhanden
an: 
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

NUR SERIÖSE BEWERTUNGEN BITTE
 🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹🔹

Casting Call | MDance Company Tour 2027

“4Elements” – A Dance Theatre Spectacle

The MDance Company is looking for one female / one male dancer for the 2027 tour production 

We are looking for
1 Male and 1 Female dancer with:
•Strong jazz technique
•Confident partnering skills
•Experience in Modern / Contemporary / Commercial 
•Strong stage presence
•Teamwork, reliability, and motivation

,🔸Rehearsals
Rehearsals will take place during the Easter holidays 2027 in Bamberg, Germany.
🔸Performances
April 7, 2027 – BAMBERG 
April 17, 2027 - ERBACH/ODW
April 24, 2027 – ANDERNACH
May 15, 2027 - NÜRNBERG 
➡️ Pay, accommodation, travel expenses, food on showdays

🔸Application
Please send your application including:
•Cover Letter telling us why you would like to become part of our Team
|current CV
|photo – Headshot and Full Body
•showreel / video link, if available
to:
🔸Melanie Day – Künstlerische Leitung von MDance Creative – info@mdancecreative.com

SERIOUS APPLICATIONS ONLY PLEASE 

We look forward to your application!

items.text:
✨WHY I FOUNDED AN ANESTHESIA SLEEP CENTER🌙 NSOMNIA SLEEP™

People often ask me why an anesthesia professional would create a sleep company.

The answer is simple.

For more than 15 years, I’ve had the privilege of caring for patients during some of the most critical moments of their lives. As a Certified Anesthesiologist Assistant, I’ve spent my career studying physiology, monitoring the brain and body, and helping patients safely navigate surgery and recovery.

Throughout that journey, I noticed something that extended far beyond the operating room.

People were exhausted.

Professionals were struggling to perform at their highest level. Entrepreneurs were sacrificing sleep in pursuit of success. Athletes were searching for every competitive advantage. Executives were battling chronic fatigue, stress, and burnout.

Yet despite all of our advances in healthcare, sleep was often overlooked.

I began asking a different question:

What if sleep wasn’t simply a period of rest? What if it was one of the most powerful tools we have for recovery, restoration, resilience, and human performance?

That question became the foundation for our work.

I founded the company to challenge conventional thinking and help elevate the conversation around sleep. Today, we are pioneering NeuroRestorative Sleep™—an innovative approach focused on optimizing recovery, supporting brain health, and helping individuals unlock their full potential.

My mission is bigger than improving sleep.

My mission is to help people restore what modern life has taken away: recovery, resilience, and the ability to perform at their best.

I’m Nyree Penn, Founder and CEO of 🌙NSOMNIA Sleep™, and I believe that when we transform sleep, we transform lives.

Because better sleep isn’t just about sleeping longer.

It’s about living better. 
🌙 NSOMNIA Sleep  
www.nsomniasleep.com
954.852.4554

#NSOMNIAsleep #NSOMNIAsleeptherapy #NeuroRestorativesleep 
#sleepandbrainhealth
#anesthesiasleep

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FAMILY PHOTO SHOOT OPPORTUNITY **

**Great Wolf Lodge Pocono Mountains | June 10th, 2026 **

Looking for fun, energetic families to participate in an upcoming lifestyle photo shoot at Great Wolf Lodge Poconos. Preferred to have 4+ people per family with children in the 4-11 year old range. 

**ABOUT THE SHOOT **

The concept features a relaxed, elevated resort atmosphere with stylish outdoor gathering spaces, family-friendly activities, food & beverage moments, and social lifestyle imagery. The campaign aims to showcase a more upscale guest experience while still capturing the fun and energy families love about Great Wolf Lodge. 

**Important Notes **

● This is primarily an **outdoor lifestyle shoot **

● **No swimwear or waterpark photography will be required **

● Talent will be photographed enjoying outdoor resort-style activities and social spaces 

● Wardrobe will focus on polished, elevated, casual summer apparel 

We’re looking for families who can naturally interact on camera and help create warm, aspirational, authentic vacation moments. 

**SHOOT DATES **

**Stay Schedule - **1 Great Wolf Dr, Scotrun, PA 18355

● **Check-In: **Tuesday, June 9, 2026 

● **Shoot Day: **Wednesday, June 10, 2026 

● **Check-Out: **Thursday, June 11, 2026 

**Tentative Production Schedule **

● Evening of 6/9: Wardrobe Check / Prep / Fitting, Prep Time: Approx. 1–2 hours 

● 6/10 Shoot Time: Approx. 6 hours total in the evening

**WHAT SELECTED FAMILIES RECEIVE **

**Lodging Included **

Complimentary lodging for the duration of the shoot stay: 

● Nights of **6/9 and 6/10 **

● Check-out on **6/11 **

Room accommodations will be based on family size. 

**SHOOT COMPENSATION & INCENTIVES **

**Compensation Package Includes:**

**Production / Stay Package **

Includes: 

● Lodging 6/9 and 6/10 (check-out 6/11) 

● (4) Paw Passes *(valued at $99.99 each) *

● Breakfast + Lunch Vouchers 

**1-Night Future Stay Voucher **

Valid between: 

**6/10/26 – 6/10/27 **

**Includes: **

● Kids Cabin Suite or similar 

*(up to $700 value) *

● (4) Paw Passes 

*(valued at $99.99 each) *

*Future stay vouchers are subject to blackout dates and room availability.*

**IDEAL TALENT **

We are seeking: 

● Real families (children ages 4-11) 

● Comfortable in front of camera 

● Energetic and expressive personalities 

● Families excited about waterpark/family resort experiences 

**INTERESTED? **

Please submit the following to Heather at [gwlcasting@gmail.com](mailto:gwlcasting@gmail.com):

● Family size 

● Names & ages of children 

● Recent family photos 

● Availability for June 9–11, 2026 

Please submit info and photos by Tuesday 6/2/26. We need to select families ASAP. Thank you!

Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.text:
Narodowy Teatr Edukacji im. Adama Mickiewicza we Wrocławiu zaprasza na rozmowy sezonowe chętnych do udziału w spektaklach naszego Teatru, realizowanych w sezonie 2026/27. 

Poszukujemy zarówno uzdolnionych amatorów, jak i aktorów z wykształceniem kierunkowym (AST, Studium Teatralne, Szkoły Artystyczne ROE, Szkoła Aktorska LART itp.)

Przedstawienia będą grane na terenie całego kraju - od września bieżącego roku, do czerwca 2027.

WYMAGANIA:

- wiek:  18 – 40 lat

- dyspozycyjność

- dobry stan zdrowia

- mile widziane dodatkowe umiejętności - wokalne i taneczne

OFERUJEMY:

- zatrudnienie na sezon w formie umowy-zlecenia/umowy o dzieło w ustalonym wymiarze (2,3 lub 4 tygodnie w miesiącu)

- gwarancję pracy (działamy nieprzerwanie od ponad 25 lat)

- elastyczny czas pracy

- atrakcyjne zarobki

- opcję ubezpieczenia zdrowotnego

- możliwość osobistego rozwoju artystycznego w profesjonalnym zespole teatralnym

- ambitny repertuar teatralny (głównie klasyka polska i europejska)

- okres prób do spektakli (sierpień-połowa września, WROCŁAW) dodatkowo gratyfikowany

Powyższa oferta dotyczy oddziału siedziby głównej Teatru we Wrocławiu.

Zgłoszenia i CV prosimy wysyłać do Dyrektora Artystycznego Marzenny Kucmer-Kołeńskiej na adres:

 teatr.zgloszenia@gmail.com

Hey everyone!

I'm a casting producer for Property Brothers and casting is now OPEN for homeowners with big reno dreams (and maybe a few “what did we get ourselves into?” moments ) in Vancouver!

We’re looking for:
• Homeowners who have **recently purchased a home**
• A minimum renovation budget of **$75K**
• At least **3 rooms** in need of renovation
• Availability for filming in **Fall 2026**

Feel free to apply: [https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/](https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/)

topComments.text: Hey. Have you ever thought of doing renos for seniors living in mobile homes? Like me, my home is showing signs of old age and can't afford the upkeep or avoiding the scams/overpricing seniors, especially since us baby boomers are living longer too.🤪
Why in the world would anybody do this, so basically it’s a cosmetic renovation that you have to pay at least $75,000 without a say in the outcome. What in the world would you get out of it?

**Halfway Pictures is now casting JESSICA, a supernatural horror feature film.**

Paid · Non-Union

Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · reads as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · reads as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s
Olivia — Supporting · Female · reads as 7

Rate: $200/day

Airfare and lodging will be provided for selected actors coming from outside Winnipeg, including from the United States.

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

items.text:
Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

 

3.      **Aaron**: **Male, 25-35. Any ethnicity.**

The department brown-noser. Aaron is always trying to impress management, climb the corporate ladder, and make himself look more important than he is. He has a long-running beef with Kenneth and enjoys trying to get under his skin.

**Tone:** Corporate suck-up, petty rival, passive-aggressive, self-important.

 

4.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

 

5.      **Depression**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s depression. Depression is strangely upbeat and excited while delivering negative thoughts, self-doubt, and emotional pressure. This character should feel charming, unsettling, and emotionally dangerous without becoming cartoonish.

**Tone:** Cheerful menace, darkly funny, manipulative, emotionally sharp.

 

6.      **Anxiety**: **Age 25-40. Any gender. Any ethnicity.**

A personified version of Kenneth’s anxiety. Anxiety is panicky, restless, and constantly processing too many thoughts at once. They bounce between positive and negative possibilities while trying to calm both Kenneth and themselves down.

**Tone:** Erratic, nervous, fast-thinking, emotionally overwhelmed, sympathetic.

 

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks.  

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

items.text:
TITLE: LAST DEBT

GENRE:
Drama / Thriller

LOGLINE:
A dangerous confrontation between two women reveals betrayal, deception, and a deadly secret that neither can escape.

ROLE:
GABY

• Female
• Age 25–40
• Hard of Hearing preferred
• Fluent in American Sign Language (ASL)
• Must be able to communicate in both ASL and spoken English
• Distinctive appearance preferred
• Strong dramatic acting ability required

Character Description:
Gaby is a complex and emotionally layered woman who appears vulnerable and trustworthy but is deeply involved in a dangerous world of deception, manipulation, and survival. The role requires emotional depth, expressive facial acting, and the ability to perform intense dramatic scenes.

PRODUCTION COMPANY:
Quiet Mile Pictures

Writer:
Martina Bell

Director:
Nicki Runge

Producer:
Martina Bell and Nicki Runge

PRODUCTION TYPE:
Independent Short Film (Non-Union)

RUN TIME:
Short Film (Approximately 5–10 minutes)

COMPENSATION:
Paid

UNION STATUS:
Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION:
Initial submission requires:
• Headshot
• Resume
• Demo Reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted to submit a self-taped audition.

Submission Deadline:
June 20, 2026

SHOOTING SCHEDULE:
Principal Photography:
July 16–17, 2026

Two-day shoot schedule.

Rehearsal dates to be scheduled with selected cast.

FILMING LOCATION:
Denver, Colorado

CONTACT INFORMATION:
Email: [audition@qmpictures.com](mailto:audition@qmpictures.com)

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:
Quiet Mile Pictures is seeking an actress for the role of Gaby in the upcoming short film Last Debt. We welcome submissions from Deaf, Hard of Hearing, and hearing performers who meet the role requirements. This is a character-driven dramatic thriller with strong emotional performances and limited locations, making it an excellent opportunity for actors seeking substantial screen time in a lead supporting role.
