items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

Thank you!

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Making you look as if you’re supposed to be in the role.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read clearly on Spotlight and other casting platforms.

Most of my sessions are shot indoors in a more controlled and comfortable environment, whatever the weather decides to do outside.

If you want to work in the comfort of your home (or a place near you), I can come with the studio to you. If you don't mind travelling, you're welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.title: Making you look as if you’re supposed to be in the role.

items.text:
One of the biggest mistakes actors make in self-tapes is playing it safe.

Casting directors, directors and producers aren’t just watching your performance. They’re asking themselves:

“Would I want to work with this person?”

When you make positive, creative choices in your self-tape, it shows confidence. It shows imagination. It shows you’re bringing something to the table rather than waiting to be told what to do.

The actors who consistently get work aren’t always the most experienced. They’re often the ones brave enough to make a choice.

Next time you self-tape, stop asking, “What do they want?”

Start asking, “What’s the most interesting version of this scene I can bring to life?”

Your choices tell people who you are.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina for support.

#ActorsLife #SelfTape #ActingCoach #CastingDirector #ScreenActing #ActorMindset

When you make positive, creative choices in your self-tape, it shows confidence. It shows imagination. It shows you’re bringing something to the table rather than waiting to be told what to do.

The actors who consistently get work aren’t always the most experienced. They’re often the ones brave enough to make a choice.

Next time you self-tape, stop asking, “What do they want?”

Start asking, “What’s the most interesting version of this scene I can bring to life?”

Your choices tell people who you are.

🔗 linktr.ee/mattzina for support.

#ActorsLife #SelfTape #ActingCoach #CastingDirector #ScreenActing #ActorMindset
items.title: One of the biggest mistakes actors make in self-tapes is playing it safe.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 23/2026

FANTASY, HORROR,  DEMENZ UND EIN KAMERAMANN 

Köpfe werden rollen. Sechsundzwanzig Jahre nach ihrer ersten Begegnung mit einem maskierten Täter geraten die verbliebenen Mitglieder der damaligen Gruppe erneut in Lebensgefahr und setzen dabei einen Angriff auf ihre Lachmuskeln in SCARY MOVIE.

Der Auserwählte ist zurück.Regisseur Travis Knight bringt das legendäre Franchise MASTERS OF THE UNIVERSE  in dem gleichnamigen epischen Live-Action-Abenteuer zurück auf die große Leinwand. 

Eine berührende Geschichte über Liebe und Freundschaft, über Vergessen und Erinnern, über das Älterwerden und Jungbleiben präsentiert Sarah Fuchs mit DER VERLORENE MANN. 

Matthias Pötsch ist ein österreichischer Kameramann und Bildgestalter (Director of Photography), der in Wien lebt. Er absolvierte sein Kamerastudium an der renommierten Filmakademie Wien unter anderem bei Wolfgang Thaler und Michael Haneke. Was er alles zu erzählen hat, bei uns in einem grossen Interview. 

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 3.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

topComments.text: Hallo zusammen, vielen Dank für die Aufnahme und die nette Begrüßung. Ich selbst bin Filmschaffender und hin und wieder auf der Suche nach  spannenden kleinen Projekten zum mitmachen, unterstützen oder leiten. Aber auch für eigene Filmstoffe suche ich hin und wieder nach engagierten Mitstreitern,  egal ob Crew oder Cast. Ich bin mit meiner Produktionsfirma Quantling-Media seit letzten Jahres in Mitteldeutschland angesiedelt. Ich freue mich, den einen oder anderen von euch kennenzulernen und auf gemeinsame Projekte, wenn es klappt.

Greetings to all qualified and experienced actors!
We are casting for an exciting movie filming in Mulderdrift, Krugersdorp, from June 22 to June 26, 2026. 

If you're interested, please submit resume, one full-body photo, a headshot, and your showreel to Sanny via whatsApp 078 121 4807

We are eager to fill the following roles:

items.text:
Actor. Director. Storyteller.

With 20+ years of experience in film, television, theatre, and commercials, I’ve been fortunate to work on projects for Wegovy, Mizuho Bank, NBC Weather App, AOL, MTV, and a variety of award-winning and independent productions.

Currently directing multiple projects while continuing to pursue acting opportunities. Open to quality collaborations in film, television, commercials, digital media, and branded content.

IMDb, reel, headshots, and professional materials are available upon request.

I am happy to discuss availability, scope, and production needs on a case-by-case basis.

#Actor #Director #NYCActor #NJActor #CommercialActor #Casting #FilmMaker #Television #Storyteller

sharedPost.text:
@everyone

CANNIBALS WANTED!

Exciting news, everyone!

We’re looking for volunteers to join us for one of the biggest and most atmospheric sequences in The Eight Saga: N.E.S.T. Project , our Cannibal Camp scenes filming in Chester on the 10th, 11th, 12th, and 13th of June.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, creative, or simply someone who wants to be part of an ambitious independent feature film, we’d love to have you with us.

This is a volunteer production powered by an incredible community of passionate creatives. What we may lack in budget, we make up for with dedication, professionalism, creativity, and an unforgettable experience. With over 200 creatives involved in the project, this is a fantastic opportunity to gain experience, build your portfolio, network with like-minded people, and become part of something special.

Bring your own tent.
Bring your own post.
apocalyptic,cannibal-style costume if possible.
Meet fellow creatives and filmmakers.
Gain hands on feature film experience.

Can’t make all four days? No problem! Even joining us for a single day is a huge help and greatly appreciated.

Come for the filmmaking, stay for the adventure, the stories, and the community.

If you’d like to be involved, let us know below or send us a message.

See you in the wasteland.

#NESTProject #IndependentFilm #FeatureFilm #Filmmaking #VolunteerActors #FilmCommunity #PostApocalyptic #BehindTheScenes #ChesterFilming

sharedPost.text:
WE ARE LOOKING FOR MEN AGED 50+ WITH OLIVE OR DARKER SKIN TONES to play Afghan characters in a feature film

We are filming a war story set in Afghanistan and are looking for men aged 50 and over with olive or darker complexions. You do not have to be Afghan to apply.

No experience is required! Anyone can apply and see firsthand what working on a professional movie set looks like behind the scenes.

GOOD PAY RATES

We can also help with transportation if needed.

DATE & LOCATION: June 11, 2026 — Dąbrowa Górnicza, Poland

APPLICATIONS:
sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

Email subject: FILM AFGHANISTAN
Please include: First name, last name, age, city, phone number, and a photo.

—

‎ما به دنبال مردان ۵۰ ساله و بالاتر با پوست گندمی یا تیره هستیم تا نقش شخصیت‌های افغان را در یک فیلم سینمایی بازی کنند.

‎ما در حال ساخت فیلمی درباره جنگ افغانستان هستیم و به دنبال مردان ۵۰ ساله و بالاتر با پوست گندمی یا تیره می‌گردیم. برای ثبت‌نام لازم نیست افغان باشید.

‎هیچ تجربه‌ای لازم نیست! هر کسی می‌تواند ثبت‌نام کند و از نزدیک ببیند که کار در پشت صحنه یک فیلم حرفه‌ای چگونه است.

‎دستمزد مناسب و جذاب پرداخت می‌شود.

‎در صورت نیاز، برای رفت‌وآمد نیز کمک خواهیم کرد.
‎تاریخ و مکان: ۱۱ ژوئن ۲۰۲۶ — دابرووا گورنیچا، لهستان
‎ثبت‌نام: sceneriaagencja@gmail.com

‎عنوان ایمیل: FILM AFGHANISTAN

‎ ‎لطفاً این موارد را ارسال کنید: نام، نام خانوادگی، سن، شماره تلفن

items.text:
!!! СРОЧНО !!! ВАРШАВА !!! ПОЛИЦИЯ !!!

Для съемок новых серий сериала «Полиция», которые проходят в Варшаве (и окрестностях), требуются мужчины разного возраста на следующие роли:

1. Должник (32) – худощавый наркоман
Дата: 12 июня
Оплата: 300 злотых нетто

Заинтересованных мужчин просим отправлять заявки по адресу: casting.outset@interia.pl

Пожалуйста, отправляйте заявки ТОЛЬКО по электронной почте (я не отвечаю на личные сообщения).

В теме письма укажите имя персонажа.

Пожалуйста, укажите в своем электронном письме следующую информацию:

1. Возраст/рост/вес
2. Контактный номер телефона
3. Ссылки на ваши видеоматериалы – демо-запись/визитку/сцены с кастинга
4. Актуальное фото
5. Краткое описание вашего опыта
6. Информация о любых актерских школах/курсах/мастер-классах, которые вы прошли
7. Информация о ваших действующих водительских правах (или их отсутствии)

Мы не возмещаем расходы на проезд/проживание

items.text:
!!! СРОЧНО !!! ВАРШАВА !!! ПОЛИЦИЯ !!!

Для съемок новых серий сериала «Полиция», которые проходят в Варшаве (и окрестностях), требуются мужчины разного возраста на следующие роли:

1. Должник (32) – худощавый наркоман
Дата: 12 июня
Оплата: 300 злотых нетто

Заинтересованных мужчин просим отправлять заявки по адресу: casting.outset@interia.pl

Пожалуйста, отправляйте заявки ТОЛЬКО по электронной почте (я не отвечаю на личные сообщения).

В теме письма укажите имя персонажа.

Пожалуйста, укажите в своем электронном письме следующую информацию:

1. Возраст/рост/вес
2. Контактный номер телефона
3. Ссылки на ваши видеоматериалы – демо-запись/визитку/сцены с кастинга
4. Актуальное фото
5. Краткое описание вашего опыта
6. Информация о любых актерских школах/курсах/мастер-классах, которые вы прошли
7. Информация о ваших действующих водительских правах (или их отсутствии)

Мы не возмещаем расходы на проезд/проживание

items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'IDŹ MA CALOŚĆ WEŻ WEŻUDZIAŁ พี DŹNACAŁOŚĆ WYŚLIJ MAILA WYŚLIJ.MAILAICZEKAJ I CZEKAJ NA WIADOMOŚĆ PAL PAULINA@SCENERIA. COM.PL Dopisek: TELETURNIEJ BAW SIĘ I WYGRYWAJ'

✨ EXTRA ROUND NOW OPEN ✨

We had so many amazing talents signing up for Selfcast Exclusive Denmark that we are opening one extra team before the summer holidays.

Selfcast Exclusive Talent Program is created for talents who want stronger material, a more professional profile, and a better way to present themselves for future castings.

As part of the program, you will get:

📸 Professional photoshoot with makeup artist
🎬 Presentation videos
💛 Selfcast workshop
👕 Selfcast T-shirt
✨ Stronger profile material for your Selfcast profile

This is more than a photoshoot. It is a full talent profile upgrade designed to help you stand stronger for future castings.

Dates:
Workshop: Sunday 14 June
Photoshoot: Monday 15 June or Tuesday 16 June

Limited spots available.

Deadline to apply: Thursday 4 June

Apply now in the Selfcast app.

#selfcast #selfcastexclusive #castingmadeeasy #selfcastallover

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team
